title: Inception
overview: A thief enters dreams to steal secrets and plant an idea in a target's subconscious.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
overview: A legendary concierge and his protégé become embroiled in a murder mystery at a famous European hotel.

title: Spirited Away
overview: A girl enters a spirit world and works in a bathhouse to free her parents.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
overview: Survivors flee across a desert wasteland in a high-octane chase for freedom.

title: Before Sunrise
overview: Two strangers share a night of conversation and connection in Vienna.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman faces the Joker as chaos engulfs Gotham City.

title: Amélie
overview: A shy waitress secretly improves the lives of people around her in Paris.

title: Interstellar
overview: Explorers travel through a wormhole in search of a new home for humanity.

title: Parasite
overview: A poor family infiltrates a wealthy household with unexpected consequences.

title: Paddington 2
overview: A polite bear seeks a gift and uncovers a crime in London.

title: Whiplash
overview: A young drummer pursues excellence under a ruthless instructor.

title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
overview: A daydreamer embarks on a real-world journey of courage and wonder.

title: Her
overview: A lonely writer forms a relationship with an advanced operating system.

title: John Wick
overview: A retired hitman seeks vengeance with legendary skill.

title: Little Miss Sunshine
overview: A dysfunctional family road-trips to a child beauty pageant.

title: La La Land
overview: A jazz musician and an aspiring actress fall in love while pursuing dreams in Los Angeles.

title: Get Out
overview: A young man uncovers a disturbing secret when visiting his girlfriend's family.

title: The Matrix
overview: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against machines.

title: Coco
overview: A boy journeys to the Land of the Dead to unlock his family's history.

title: Arrival
overview: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien visitors.

title: The Social Network
overview: The founding of Facebook and the legal battles that followed.

title: Moonlight
overview: A young man grapples with identity and connection across three chapters of life.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
overview: An exhausted laundromat owner is pulled into a multiverse battle to save existence.

title: The Farewell
overview: A family gathers under a wedding pretense to say goodbye without saying it.

title: Dune
overview: A gifted young man must travel to the most dangerous planet to ensure his family's future.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
overview: Teen Miles Morales becomes Spider-Man and joins spider-people from across the multiverse.

title: Pride & Prejudice
overview: Sparks fly between spirited Elizabeth Bennet and proud Mr. Darcy in Georgian England.

title: The Grand Illusion
overview: French officers navigate class and camaraderie as prisoners during World War I.

title: Knives Out
overview: A detective investigates the death of a patriarch among a dysfunctional wealthy family.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and eventual redemption.

title: Chef
overview: A chef rediscovers passion and family on a food truck road trip.

title: Ex Machina
overview: A young programmer is selected to participate in a groundbreaking experiment in artificial intelligence.

title: The Intouchables
overview: An unlikely friendship forms between a wealthy quadriplegic and his caregiver.

title: Blade Runner 2049
overview: A young blade runner discovers a secret that could plunge society into chaos.

title: Ratatouille
overview: A rat who can cook makes an unusual alliance with a young kitchen worker.

title: Nightcrawler
overview: A driven man becomes a stringer who films crime scenes for TV news.

title: Your Name
overview: Two strangers mysteriously swap bodies and search for each other across time.

title: The Big Short
overview: Investors bet against the US mortgage market as the 2008 crash approaches.

title: Soul
overview: A jazz musician has a near-death experience and contemplates his life's purpose.

title: The Batman
overview: Batman uncovers corruption in Gotham while pursuing the Riddler.
